metadata.website_type: home renovation and extension builder website

tasks.name: Request a quote for the cheapest 20–30 sqm rear extension under $80,000
tasks.description: Find rear extension packages between 20–30 sqm, filter to a maximum budget of $80,000, sort by price, select the cheapest result, and submit a quote request for that package.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Extensions" option in the main navigation menu.
On the Extensions page, locate the filters sidebar and select "Rear extension" from the "Extension type" dropdown.
In the "Size (sqm)" range controls, set the minimum size to 20 and the maximum size to 30.
Find the "Budget" or "Maximum price" filter and enter "80000" as the maximum budget value.
Click the "Apply filters" button to update the list of extension packages.
Above the results list, open the sort dropdown and select the "Price: Low to High" sorting option.
Click on the first extension package card in the sorted results list (the cheapest package that matches the filters).
On the package detail page, click the "Get a quote" button.

In the quote request form, enter your name, email address, phone number, postcode "3000", and budget "80000", type the note "25 sqm rear extension with open-plan kitchen", and click the "Submit quote request" button.

tasks.name: Book a weekday afternoon consultation for the cheapest kitchen renovation under $35,000
tasks.description: Find kitchen renovation packages under $35,000, sort by price to select the cheapest one, and book an on-site consultation on a weekday afternoon time slot for that package.
steps: From the homepage, click on the "Services" menu in the header and select "Kitchen renovations" from the dropdown.
On the Kitchen Renovations page, locate the price range filter and set the maximum price to "35000".
Click the "Apply" or "Filter" button to refresh the list of kitchen renovation packages.
Open the sort dropdown above the package list and choose the "Price: Low to High" option.
Click on the first kitchen renovation package in the sorted results list (the cheapest package under $35,000).
On the package detail page, click the "Book consultation" button.
In the booking form, select "Kitchen renovation" from the "Project type" dropdown and choose the next available Wednesday date from the date picker.
In the time slot options, select an afternoon slot between 2:00 pm and 4:00 pm (for example, the "3:00 pm" option).
Fill in your name, email address, and phone number in the corresponding fields, then click the "Confirm consultation request" button.

tasks.name: Choose the larger floor-area extension package under $120,000 and save it to your shortlist
tasks.description: Compare two extension packages under $120,000 and select the one with the larger added floor area, then add that package to a shortlist or favorites list.
steps: Go to the website homepage and click on the "Extensions" option in the main navigation.
On the Extensions page, set the "Maximum price" or "Budget" filter to "120000" and click the "Apply filters" button.
From the first four extension packages displayed, click the "Add to compare" button on the first two packages that show a price at or below $120,000.
Click the "Compare (2)" button or link that appears (usually near the top or bottom of the page) to open the comparison view for these two packages.
In the comparison table, locate the row or attribute labeled "Added floor area" or "Floor area (sqm)" for both packages.
Identify which of the two packages shows the larger floor area value in square meters.
In the comparison view, click the "View details" or package title link for the package with the larger floor area.
On that package’s detail page, click the "Save to shortlist" or "Add to favorites" button.

tasks.name: Save three highly rated loft conversion projects (4.5+ stars, completed in 2023 or later) to an Ideas list
tasks.description: Filter the project gallery to show loft conversions completed in or after 2023 with a rating of at least 4.5 stars, then save the first three matching projects to an Ideas or favorites list.
steps: From the homepage, click on the "Projects" or "Gallery" link in the main navigation.
In the gallery filters, select "Loft conversion" from the "Project type" dropdown.
Find the "Completion year" or "Year" filter and set the minimum year to "2023".
Locate the "Rating" filter and set it to show only projects with a rating of "4.5" stars or higher, then click the "Apply" or "Filter" button.
Scroll down the project results area until at least three projects that match these filters are visible.
Click on the first loft conversion project thumbnail to open its detail page, then click the "Save to Ideas" or heart-shaped "Favorite" button.
Use the browser back button or the gallery breadcrumb link to return to the filtered gallery view.
Click on the second project thumbnail and repeat the action by clicking the "Save to Ideas" or "Favorite" button.
Return once more to the gallery view, click on the third project thumbnail, and click the "Save to Ideas" or "Favorite" button for that project.

tasks.name: Generate a cost estimate for a 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom full home renovation with mid-range finishes and budget $180,000, then send the summary via on-site email form
tasks.description: Use the renovation cost calculator to configure a full home renovation with 3 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, mid-range finishes, and a budget of $180,000, then use the built-in email form to send the cost summary to a specified email address.
steps: On the homepage, click the "Cost calculator" or "Get an estimate" button in the header or hero section.
In the calculator’s "Project type" dropdown, select "Full home renovation".
In the "Bedrooms" field or dropdown, select "3" bedrooms.
In the "Bathrooms" field or dropdown, select "2" bathrooms.
In the "Finish level" or "Quality" options, choose the "Mid-range" option.
In the budget input field labeled "Your budget" or similar, type "180000".
Click the "Calculate" or "View estimate" button to generate the renovation cost estimate.
On the results page, click the "Send summary" or "Email this estimate" button.
In the email popup or form, type your name in the name field and enter an email address such as "user@example.com" in the email field.
Click the "Send summary" or "Email estimate" button to complete sending the cost breakdown.

tasks.name: Save and reopen a 2023+ blog article about planning permits for extensions
tasks.description: Search the blog for articles about planning permits for extensions published in or after 2023, save the first matching article to a reading list, then reopen it from that list.
steps: From the homepage, click on the "Blog" link in the main navigation menu.
In the blog page search bar, type "planning permit extension" and click the search icon or button.
Use the blog filters to set the "Year" or "Published" filter to show posts from "2023" and later, then click the "Apply" button.
From the search results, click on the first article title that appears.
On the article page, click the "Add to reading list" or "Save for later" button.
In the site header or user tools area, click on the "Reading list" or "Saved articles" link.
In the reading list, locate the article you just saved, identified by its title, and click on that title.
On the reopened article page, scroll down the content by one full screen height.
Click the browser back button or the site’s "Back to blog" link to return to the blog section.

tasks.name: Find the bathroom renovation warranty FAQ and send a follow-up question using the contact form
tasks.description: Locate the FAQ entry specifically about bathroom renovation warranty, open its details, then use the linked contact form to send a follow-up question referencing that warranty.
steps: On the homepage, click on the "Help" or "FAQ" link in the main navigation or footer.
In the FAQ page search box, type "bathroom warranty" and press the search button.
From the resulting list, click on the FAQ entry whose title includes the phrase "bathroom renovation warranty".
On the FAQ detail or expanded answer, scroll to the bottom and click the "Contact us about this" or similar link provided under the answer.
On the contact form page, open the "Subject" or "Topic" dropdown and select "Bathroom renovation".
In the message text area, type a question such as "I would like to confirm the warranty details for premium bathroom renovations."
Fill in your name in the name field and enter an email address such as "user@example.com" in the email field.
Enter a phone number (for example, "0400000000") in the phone field if it is present.
Click the "Send message" or "Submit inquiry" button to submit the follow-up question.

tasks.name: Create a multi-project renovation plan with a $20,000 bathroom renovation and a $25,000 deck extension
tasks.description: Use the multi-project quote builder to add two separate projects—a bathroom renovation with a $20,000 budget and a deck extension with a $25,000 budget—and submit the combined renovation plan.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Build your renovation plan" or "Multi-project quote" button in the header or main banner.
On Step 1 of the plan builder, use the "Project type" dropdown to select "Bathroom renovation" for the first project.
In the budget field for this project, enter "20000" as the budget amount and select the property type as "Apartment" from the property type dropdown.
Click the "Add another project" or "+ Add project" button to create a second project entry.
For the second project, select "Deck extension" from the "Project type" dropdown.
In the budget field for this deck extension, enter "25000" and set the property type to "House" from the property type dropdown.
Click the "Next: Your details" or equivalent button to move to the details step.
On the details step, fill in your name, email address, phone number, and postcode in the respective fields.
Click the "Submit renovation plan" or "Request combined quote" button to send the multi-project renovation plan.

entities.name: Package
entities.description: Renovation and extension packages (extensions, kitchens, bathrooms, etc.) shown in listings, details, comparison, and shortlist.

fields.name: slug
fields.description: URL-friendly identifier

fields.name: category_id
fields.description: Matches categoryId in package listing URLs

fields.name: project_type
fields.description: High-level project type this package belongs to

fields.name: extension_type
fields.description: Specific extension subtype used in Extensions filters

fields.name: price
fields.description: Package base price

fields.name: size_sqm
fields.description: Overall package size in square meters (used for filters like 20–30 sqm)

fields.name: added_floor_area_sqm
fields.description: Added floor area in sqm for extensions; used in comparisons

fields.name: inclusions
fields.description: List of inclusion bullet points for this package

fields.name: images
fields.description: Array of image URLs or objects for gallery on detail page

fields.name: rating
fields.description: Optional average user rating for the package

fields.name: is_featured
fields.description: Whether this package is highlighted on the homepage

fields.name: is_active
fields.description: Whether this package is available to be shown and requested

entities.name: PackageShortlist
entities.description: The user’s shortlist/favorites collection for packages.

entities.name: PackageShortlistItem
entities.description: Individual package entries saved in the shortlist.

fields.name: shortlist_id
fields.description: References PackageShortlist.id

fields.name: package_id
fields.description: References Package.id

entities.name: PackageCompareSet
entities.description: A comparison session representing the current set of packages selected for side-by-side comparison.

entities.name: PackageCompareItem
entities.description: Individual package entries inside a comparison set (e.g., the two packages compared in Task 3).

fields.name: compare_set_id
fields.description: References PackageCompareSet.id

fields.name: package_id
fields.description: References Package.id

entities.name: QuoteRequest
entities.description: Quote requests submitted from a package detail page (e.g., rear extension quote under $80,000).

fields.name: package_id
fields.description: Package being quoted (Package.id)

fields.name: package_name_snapshot
fields.description: Package name at time of request for display in confirmations

fields.name: budget
fields.description: Customer-stated budget for this quote request

fields.name: note
fields.description: Free-text note such as '25 sqm rear extension with open-plan kitchen'

entities.name: ConsultationBooking
entities.description: On-site consultation requests linked to a specific package (e.g., cheapest kitchen renovation consultation).

fields.name: package_id
fields.description: References Package.id

fields.name: consultation_date
fields.description: Date of consultation (time component may be normalized)

fields.name: time_slot_label
fields.description: Display label for slot, e.g., '3:00 pm'

fields.name: time_of_day
fields.description: Used to ensure a weekday afternoon slot is chosen

entities.name: Project
entities.description: Completed renovation and extension projects shown in the gallery (e.g., loft conversions with ratings and completion year).

fields.name: completion_year
fields.description: Used for filters such as '2023 or later'

fields.name: rating
fields.description: Star rating, e.g., 4.5

fields.name: floor_area_sqm
fields.description: Floor area for the completed project

fields.name: images
fields.description: Gallery images for the project

entities.name: IdeasList
entities.description: The user’s Ideas list containing saved project inspirations from the gallery.

entities.name: IdeasListItem
entities.description: Individual projects saved into the Ideas list (e.g., loft conversion projects).

fields.name: ideas_list_id
fields.description: References IdeasList.id

fields.name: project_id
fields.description: References Project.id

entities.name: CostEstimate
entities.description: Estimates generated by the cost calculator (e.g., 3-bed, 2-bath full home renovation).

fields.name: budget
fields.description: User-entered budget used in the calculator

fields.name: estimated_cost
fields.description: Calculated estimate result

fields.name: breakdown_items
fields.description: Line items or sections of the cost breakdown

entities.name: CostEstimateEmail
entities.description: Records of cost estimate summaries emailed from the calculator.

fields.name: estimate_id
fields.description: References CostEstimate.id

entities.name: Article
entities.description: Blog articles about renovation topics, including planning permits for extensions.

fields.name: year
fields.description: Publication year for filters such as '2023 and later'

fields.name: categories
fields.description: High-level categories (e.g., permits, extensions)

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Keyword tags used for search like 'planning permit extension'

entities.name: ReadingList
entities.description: The user’s saved list of blog articles to read later.

entities.name: ReadingListItem
entities.description: Individual article entries saved into the Reading List.

fields.name: reading_list_id
fields.description: References ReadingList.id

fields.name: article_id
fields.description: References Article.id

entities.name: FaqItem
entities.description: FAQ entries shown on the Help & FAQ page, including bathroom renovation warranty information.

fields.name: keywords
fields.description: Terms used for FAQ search like 'bathroom warranty'

fields.name: has_contact_link
fields.description: Whether to show a deep link to the contact form under this answer

entities.name: ContactMessage
entities.description: Messages submitted via the contact form, including follow-up questions about bathroom renovation warranty.

fields.name: subject_type
fields.description: Selected from Subject/Topic dropdown

fields.name: source_page
fields.description: Where the contact form was opened from

fields.name: related_faq_id
fields.description: References FaqItem.id when deep-linked from an FAQ such as bathroom renovation warranty

entities.name: RenovationPlan
entities.description: Multi-project renovation plans built via the plan builder (e.g., combined bathroom renovation and deck extension).

fields.name: total_budget
fields.description: Optional total of all project budgets

entities.name: RenovationPlanProject
entities.description: Individual projects within a multi-project renovation plan (e.g., bathroom renovation and deck extension line items).

fields.name: plan_id
fields.description: References RenovationPlan.id

fields.name: budget
fields.description: Per-project budget (e.g., 20000 for bathroom, 25000 for deck)

fields.name: description
fields.description: Optional notes for this project

fields.name: order_index
fields.description: Order in which projects were added to the plan
